actions.name: CheckSubscription
actions.description: Grants permission to check whether the account has access to given product

actions.name: CreateCaseDraft
actions.description: Grants permission to create or update case draft for the given case type

actions.name: CreateContact
actions.description: Grants permission to create an authenticated contact for the given contact type

actions.name: DeleteCaseDraft
actions.description: Grants permission to delete a case draft for the given case type

actions.name: DescribeDynamicHelp
actions.description: Grants permission to get dynamic help resources for given service and category

actions.name: GetAccountGovCloudEnabled
actions.description: Grants permission to determines whether the calling account is GovCloud enabled

actions.name: GetAccountState
actions.description: Grants permission to get the state of the calling account

actions.name: GetBanner
actions.description: Grants permission to get the support banner information

actions.name: GetCaseDraft
actions.description: Grants permission to get a case draft for given case type

actions.name: GetIssueClassificationPredictions
actions.description: Grants permission to get classification predictions of an issue

actions.name: GetIssueTextSummary
actions.description: Grants permission to get a generated text summary of an issue

actions.name: GetQuestionnaire
actions.description: Grants permission to get a feedback questionnaire

actions.name: SaveFeedback
actions.description: Grants permission to save questionnaire feedback
